title: Nature's Edge (Not updated)
description: Nature's Edge Modpack adds maximum realism to your adventure with your friends or alone
body:
![logo modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e18a863968036d554e515b73ddb4546730e66377.png)
 
# Description 
ModPack Nature's Edge with an infinite number of possibilities such as the Create mod and the addons accompanying it in this list, a totally customized world generation, more than 30 new ores to expand your defense and mining and gathering equipment, a new set of enchantments that can be used in the tools adapted to the one that seems to be most likely to enchant. New structure and generation of dimensions completely different from the one you knew. New music that is accompanied by the original music of the game. The way you organize yourself has never been easier with drawer blocks and upgraders to make it easier for you to store your found items, and mined minerals.
<details>
<summary>Herobrine Warning ⚠️</summary>

A small thing also, you will not be alone in your adventure if you are solo, only one person who is not unknown to the world of Minecraft will observe you behind your back and as soon as you turn around you will see him for a micro second or see him in the distance observing you,  Come closer and it will disappear
![Herobrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e83d9968585e0545733e1e5420e46e0a7c51cce.png)</details>
# Ressources pack & Shaders Pack
Do you think the game seems moody, not realistic? Then the Nature's Edge modpack gives you its resource pack and shaders pack that gives your Minecraft a touch of realism to your world and the way you see your animated game.








# Official Server
Nature's Edge also has a server to be able to test with other people the modpack, it is a survival server with the same list of mods as the modpack you downloaded and installed in your Modrinth application. It is accessible to anyone who has a premium version of the game, updated regularly to avoid possible bugs. available from the list of frontline servers.

```
This Modpack is inspired by the Survival Resmastered modpack
```


## Mods List

    - Macaw's Furnitures
    - Macaw's Doors
    - Macaw's Fence & Wall
    - Macaw's Bridges
    - Macaw's Trapdoors
    - Macaw's Window
    - Immersive Painting
    - Another Furniture
    - Create déco
    - CopyCat+ Create
    - Chipped
    - Clutter
    - Amendments
    - Farm Delight
    - Supplementary
  - Generation & Adventure
    - Ambience Sound
    - Sound Physics Remastered
    - Particular
    - Spawn Animation (hostile mobs)
    - Naturalist
    - Immersive Ore
    - Pure Ore
    - Nature Arise (World Générator)
    - Wilder Wild
    - Cinderscapes
    - Traverse
    - Sniffers+
    - Many More Ore : [Link CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/many-more-ores-forge)
    - End Remastered
    - The Guild 
  - Technical
    - Create
    - Create's Building Block
    - Steam 'n' Rails
    - Steam 'n' Rails (Conductor Caps)
    - Steam 'n' Rails (Tracks)
    - Chunk Loaders
  - Storage
    - Extended Drawers
    - Inmis
## Ressource pack
- NE Ressource (Texture of all blocks reworked)
- Fresh Animation (animals and mobs animated)
- Eyeless Fresh Move (body animated)
## Shaders Pack
- Bliss Shader
- Complementary Unbound
- Complementary Reimagined
- OPAL 1.0
- BSL 8.2.09
